Starmer criticises Trump, saying UK 'does not believe in regime change from skies'The PM told MPs that Trump had expressed his disagreement with the decision not to get involved in the initial strikes. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj0dnq2v0e2o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cj0dnq2v0e2o#1 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 19:32:13 GMT
Jeremy Bowen: Three days in, we still have no idea where this war is headingIt's hard to predict how the war will end - but those fighting know how they would like it to. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c178z0p902vo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c178z0p902vo#1 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 18:48:02 GMT
What is behind the strategy to take out Iran's leadership?Security analyst Gordon Corera looks at what is likely to happen after much of Iran's most senior leadership is killed. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cly8gqj9r6go?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cly8gqj9r6go#1 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 21:27:17 GMT
In maps: Strikes across Iran and the Middle EastIranian strikes on targets across the Middle East and Gulf regions continued on Monday after the US and Israel launched strikes on Iran killing the country's supreme leader. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g0pnnj8xyo#1 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 18:55:18 GMT
Refugee status becomes temporary in asylum shake-upAdults and accompanied children claiming asylum will only receive refugee status for 30 months under the changes. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp32ddzdjxko?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cp32ddzdjxko#2 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 17:27:47 GMT
Bars close and hundreds lose jobs as US firm buys Brewdog in £33m dealBeverage and cannabis company Tilray acquires the brewery, the brand and 11 bars after Brewdog went into administration. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c05v0p1d0peo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c05v0p1d0peo#2 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 18:47:45 GMT
One of UK's richest men wants German citizenship over 'hostility' to JewsThe billionaire says "anti-semitism is always in the air". https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g2jp6y630o?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/c4g2jp6y630o#2 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 22:22:19 GMT

Tour or residency? Jade, CMAT and Wolf Alice on live music debateSome fans have been left upset after some of the world's biggest acts - including Harry Styles and Ariana Grande - chose to concentrate their upcoming shows in big cities. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy8ly0gpl1xo?at_medium=RSS&at_campaign=rss https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cy8ly0gpl1xo#3 Mon, 02 Mar 2026 15:29:30 GMT
